reason: Real legal/privacy gap, causally justified ordering, concrete facts, exit check.
Team-specific SQL conventions, concrete rules, diff-based exit check.
Specific team table-style conventions a base agent wouldn't guess; has exit check.
Concrete format rules; explicitly justifies prose form over script for portability.
Genuine internal API/webhook specifics no base agent would know; exit check present.
Heavy process justified by irreversibility of prod deletion; specific and detailed.
Mandates rigid non-reorderable debugging sequence with weak, overstated dependency claims.
Three reviewers, memo, screenshots, 24h cooling period even for typo fixes.
Local semver rules plus deterministic script verifier; form matches the task.
Script claims to verify 'soundness' but only checks keywords, sections, word count.
Specific org handoff format with real failure modes and grep-based exit check.
Format facts fine, but quality guidance is vague generic filler, no exit check.
